facebook.caption: Tourists keep walking past this place on Đường Nguyễn Trãi. Their loss. Blue Seafood Restaurant (블루씨푸드) is pulling 4.7 stars across 967 reviews and the locals who eat here aren't rushing to tell you about it. Fresh seafood, Khu 1 location, zero resort markup. This is where you actually eat in Phu Quoc. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
